name: IEC 61400 — Wind energy (baseline)
standard: IEC 61400-1:2019 (Design requirements for wind turbines) + IEC 61400-22:2010 (Conformity testing & certification) + IEC 61400-24:2019 (Lightning protection)
description: Baseline wind-energy EPC rule pack. Validates the minimum dossier items expected on any wind project: turbine class assigned (IEC class I / II / III / S), site wind resource assessment present, design load case documented, foundation load envelope set, lightning protection class set, grid-code compliance documented, commissioning protocol attached. For the deep IEC 61400 family rules (turbulence category, 12-month met mast, micrositing wake loss, type / project certificate, ZVI, shadow flicker, etc.) enable the iec_61400_wind_full rule pack alongside.
